title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs · Contract Clinic: Handoff Quality
summary: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt handoff quality increment in a durable task state and handoff record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
Checkpoint at verified boundaries with rerunnable commands and safe restart instructions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# Cross-agent prompt portfolio

steps.title: Predict Handoff Quality
steps.instruction:
theory case — Use a changed theory case for prompt long context that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.text: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: For Handoff Quality, preserve authority, safety, accessibility, traceability, and stakeholder consequences alongside the technical a durable task state and handoff record result.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case for prompt long context that tests this competency: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Handoff Quality, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a durable task state and handoff record.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A list of edited filenames is a complete handoff. This fails the Handoff Quality contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

steps.title: Build Handoff Quality evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-handoff-quality-1atwq9" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Handoff Quality into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-handoff-quality-1atwq9
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

options.text: Keep the Handoff Quality artifact unchanged and rewrite its explanation so the unsupported output appears intentional. This does not resolve repair the handoff quality defect.
